headline: Is Veeva Systems Inc. (VEEV) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is VEEV a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Veeva Systems Inc. on X.com by @tomicki. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on VEEV. Veeva Systems Inc.’s share was trading at $188.66 as of June 1st. VEEV’s trailing and forward P/E were 34.68 and 21.28 respectively according to Yahoo […]
